---
title: "Dashboard"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-16"
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
```

```{r}
# Use your existing final_data
data <- final_data

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Follow-up Team Dashboard"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput(
        "statusId",
        "Select statusId:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$statusId)))),
        selected = "All"
      ),
      
      selectInput(
        "event_short",
        "Select event_short:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$event_short)))),
        selected = "All"
      ),
      
      selectInput(
        "follow_up_team",
        "Select follow-up team:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$follow_up_team)))),
        selected = "All"
      )
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      fluidRow(
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Total Score"),
            textOutput("total_score")
          )
        ),
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Number of Records"),
            textOutput("n_records")
          )
        ),
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Average Score"),
            textOutput("avg_score")
          )
        )
      ),
      
      tabsetPanel(
        tabPanel(
          "Score by Team",
          plotlyOutput("score_by_team", height = "450px")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Score by Event",
          plotlyOutput("score_by_event", height = "450px")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Team x Event Heatmap",
          plotlyOutput("heatmap", height = "500px")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Data Table",
          DTOutput("data_table")
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    df <- data
    
    if (input$statusId != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(statusId == input$statusId)
    }
    
    if (input$event_short != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(event_short == input$event_short)
    }
    
    if (input$follow_up_team != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(follow_up_team == input$follow_up_team)
    }
    
    df
  })
  
  output$total_score <- renderText({
    sum(filtered_data()$Score, na.rm = TRUE)
  })
  
  output$n_records <- renderText({
    nrow(filtered_data())
  })
  
  output$avg_score <- renderText({
    round(mean(filtered_data()$Score, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
  })
  
  output$score_by_team <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(follow_up_team) %>%
      summarise(total_score = sum(Score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = follow_up_team, y = total_score)) +
      geom_col() +
      labs(
        title = "Total Score by Follow-up Team",
        x = "Follow-up Team",
        y = "Total Score"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
    
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  output$score_by_event <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(event_short) %>%
      summarise(total_score = sum(Score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = event_short, y = total_score)) +
      geom_col() +
      labs(
        title = "Total Score by Event",
        x = "Event",
        y = "Total Score"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )
    
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  output$heatmap <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(follow_up_team, event_short) %>%
      summarise(total_score = sum(Score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = event_short, y = follow_up_team, fill = total_score)) +
      geom_tile() +
      labs(
        title = "Team by Event Score Heatmap",
        x = "Event",
        y = "Follow-up Team",
        fill = "Score"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )
    
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  output$data_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(
      filtered_data(),
      options = list(
        pageLength = 20,
        scrollX = TRUE
      )
    )
  })
}
```

```{r}
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
